dark_background.note: Use white/yellow logos on dark, black, charcoal, or high-contrast technology layouts.

light_background.note: Use black/yellow logos on white, light gray, or pale layouts.

monochrome_or_low_contrast.note: Use gray variants only for subtle or monochrome compositions.

primary_logos.black_yellow: P:/ZCash/Zcash 2026/Zcash MidiaKit/Zcash/PNG/Primary Logo/Primary Logo Black Yellow.png
primary_logos.light_gray: P:/ZCash/Zcash 2026/Zcash MidiaKit/Zcash/PNG/Primary Logo/Primary Logo Light Gray.png
primary_logos.white_yellow: P:/ZCash/Zcash 2026/Zcash MidiaKit/Zcash/PNG/Primary Logo/Primary Logo White Yellow.png

secondary_logos.black_yellow: P:/ZCash/Zcash 2026/Zcash MidiaKit/Zcash/PNG/Secondary Logo/Secondary Logo Black Yellow.png
secondary_logos.light_gray: P:/ZCash/Zcash 2026/Zcash MidiaKit/Zcash/PNG/Secondary Logo/Secondary Logo Light Gray.png

canva_notes.limitation: Canva API tools cannot import directly from local P:/ paths. Use these paths as the source of truth locally; for Canva editing, the logo must be available in the Canva brand kit/assets or via a public HTTPS URL.
